images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a long row of identical network switches receding into shadow, perfectly uniform and neatly cabled; a clean beam of automated light sweeps along the row from one end; mid-row, one switch is subtly different — an old hand-run cable looped and tied off years ago, its port glowing faint red — sitting directly in the beam's path. The machine-speed rollout about to meet the forgotten manual fix. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent on the one hand-fixed port only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. No readable text, letters, or numbers anywhere. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
